name: Modrinth store
description: Modrinth store for AirLink - Browse, search, and install mods, modpacks, plugins, shaders, and more
author: g-flame (https://github.com/g-flame)

migrations.name: create_modrinth_cache
migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ModrinthCache (cacheKey TEXT PRIMARY KEY, data TEXT NOT NULL, expiresAt DATETIME NOT NULL)

migrations.name: create_modrinth_installations
migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ModrinthInstallation (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, projectId TEXT NOT NULL, projectType TEXT NOT NULL, projectName TEXT, versionId TEXT, serverId TEXT, status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('completed', 'failed', 'blocked', 'in_progress')), error TEXT, installedAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, createdAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

migrations.name: create_modrinth_index_status
migrations.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_modrinth_status ON ModrinthInstallation(status)

migrations.name: create_modrinth_index_project
migrations.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_modrinth_project ON ModrinthInstallation(projectId, status)

migrations.name: create_modrinth_index_server
migrations.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_modrinth_server ON ModrinthInstallation(serverId)

migrations.name: create_modrinth_index_installed_at
migrations.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_modrinth_installed_at ON ModrinthInstallation(installedAt)

migrations.name: create_modrinth_collections
migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ModrinthCollection (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, userId INTEGER NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, createdAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updatedAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

migrations.name: create_modrinth_collection_items
migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ModrinthCollectionItem (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, collectionId INTEGER NOT NULL, projectId TEXT NOT NULL, projectName TEXT, projectType TEXT, addedAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (collectionId) REFERENCES ModrinthCollection(id) ON DELETE CASCADE)

migrations.name: create_modrinth_search_history
migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ModrinthSearchHistory (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, userId INTEGER NOT NULL, query TEXT NOT NULL, type TEXT, searchedAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
